entry.title: Re: Error appears while displaying "host" tab in alert in...
entry.content:
Please try the following KBA:
2398328 - Error "The value entered in fields "Technical System" is not valid" in Alert Inbox

Best Regards,
Weihua

entry.title: Re: How to make hard reservation for production order
entry.content:
1. For the header material （Finished material） in the production order, the "Strategy Group" in MRP 3 should be MTO (ex. 20).

2. For the component, the "Individual/coll." in MRP4 should be 1.

3. And there is a Sales order for the Finished material, and the production order should link the sales order (Which means the requirement from the sales order, then run MRP to generate the Planed order, then transfer the planned order into production order).

4. For the component "Individual/coll." =1, the stock should be link the sales order, and for the order production order cannot use this material's stock.

More detail information, you can check the scope item "BJE".

Process Navigator - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Given a date, how to find the nearest Monday using SA...
entry.content: Hi Thomas, Thanks. Can you please give the solution on solving this with scripting in a story?

entry.title: Side Drawer bind with Entity set
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to bind the OData entity set to the Side Drawer to show all the entry in a list but i am unable to achieve.

Could you please any one has done in the past or how i can bind the entity set to the side drawer.

@bill_froelich  Please advise?

Thanks,

Krishna

entry.title: 上新啦！SAP 分析云 2024.11 版功能更新
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能 (BI)、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.11 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期 (QRC) 客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024 年第3季度版本的一部分提供。在此处可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。 

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本1.0.407，以利用所有数据采集类型。

代理的最低版本仍为 1.0.75，但以下情况除外：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库的版本 1.0.99
  • SAP universe （UNX） 的版本 1.0.365（SAP 分析云代理需要其他设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明 3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse （BW） 的版本 1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View 的版本 1.0.235
  • File Server版本 1.0.248

有关详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关SAP BW与SAP分析云集成的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅SAP Note 2541557了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP分析云的 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 实时访问Universe时的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的简易部署工具包。

  • 注意：为避免下载旧版本，以及可能让用户面对Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的不当绑定问题，只有三个最新版本的工具包可供下载。

有关云代理版本变更管理详情，请参阅 SAP Note 3264839。

更新亮点

  • 管理和服务管理
    • 防止丢失通过 BTP 意外删除的 SAP 分析云租户
  • 数据发掘
    • 在数据分析器中为两个结构BW查询添加对结构成员的计算
    • 数据分析器中保留上次使用值
  • 数据集成
    • 数据导出 API – 增量差异
    • 支持基于 OData 连接的 X509 证书身份验证
  • 故事设计
    • 优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片
    • 在地理可视化对象中，精简版查看器现在支持按维着色的气泡图层
  • 故事可扩展性
    • 以动态文本或脚本 API 的形式检索非输入就绪变量

 

管理和服务管理

防止丢失通过 BTP 意外删除的 SAP 分析云租户

如果您不小心在 SAP BTP 主控室中删除了服务实例，可在七天内恢复。点击此处此处了解更多信息。

 

数据发掘

在数据分析器中为两个结构BW查询添加对结构成员的计算

在“可用对象”面板的“结构”部分中增加了“+添加计算”按钮。这样就可以在 BW的两个结构化查询中使用结构成员创建计算。

 

数据分析器中保留上次使用值

现在，上次使用的已定义部件和交互值将被保留，在重新打开数据分析器时，选项将保持不变。数据分析器用户现在可以设置以下内容：

  • 默认显示/隐藏过滤器行
  • 分别打开/关闭样式面板和构建器面板和可用对象列表
  • 默认情况下，展开/折叠样式设置面板和生成器面板和可用对象列表
  • 默认情况下，在数据源浏览器中设置系统和连接类型
  • 保留 PDF、Microsoft Excel 和 CSV 导出对话框中的所有设置（导出名称除外）

 

数据集成

数据导出 API - 增量差异

数据导出服务 API 订阅已扩展，以支持在执行增量提取时计算新旧数值增量值之间的差异，而不仅仅是新度量值。

 

基于 OData 连接的 X509 证书身份验证

用户现在可以选择客户端证书身份验证，并将 X.509 证书用于通用 OData 连接、SAP Business ByDesign Analytics 和 SAP S4/HANA Cloud 连接。

 

故事设计

优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片

优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片。Google 幻灯片可以另存为新演示文稿，也可以添加到 Google Drive 文件夹现有演示文稿中。

精简查看器中不支持这一功能。

 

地理可视化对象中，精简版查看器现在支持按维着色的气泡图层

精简查看器现在支持地理地图中的气泡图层按维着色。按维着色的气泡图层将不再自动重新定向到完整查看器。

“地理可视化对象”的交互性也有一些改进：

对地理可视化的交互性进行了一些改进，其中包括：

  • 改进了与按维着色的气泡的交互
  • 使用工具提示合并钻取
  • 改进阈值工具提示

 

故事可扩展性

在优化故事体验中，动态文本和与变量相关的脚本 API（如 getVariables 和 getVariableValues）现在支持非输入就绪变量。

从与 SAP Business Warehouse （SAP BW） 的实时连接中检索未准备好输入的变量，例如客户出口变量：

  • 作为动态文本
  • 通过脚本 API
    • getDataSource（）.getVariableValues（）
    • getDataSource（）.getVariables

 

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和改进功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP 知识库文章。

如果您对本博文的内容有任何疑问，可以在下方发表评论。如果您有具体的产品或技术问题，请在我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 问答论坛上提问。访问我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 社区页面，了解更多产品信息、卓越实践等。查看我们的 SAP 路线图浏览器，了解 SAP Analytics Cloud 即将推出的更多功能。

entry.title: Re: can not re-read production order's PP master data(WM...
entry.content:
This a old thread, but I came across it when I was looking for an answer. This is answered in the following thread that was posted later in 2013.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/read-pp-master-data-co02/qaq-p/11283858

Essentially, there is a SAP note - 1642564, provides a workaround.

entry.title: ็How to select open item with "AND" Condition when call FM POSTING_INTERFACE_CLEARINGN?
entry.content:
Hi, Expert 

I want to open item with zuonr and belnr. Can anyone help me ?

thank you very much

entry.title: Re: Is writing to SAP Datasphere using OData4 / REST supp...
entry.content:
Hello,

in my eyes there are two techn. ways to write data from outside into Datasphere: 

  • Using the Database User with the Open SQL Schema 
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/3de55a78a4614deda589633baea28645.html?locale=en-US
  • Or using the Command Line Interface (It's more for the DSP Tenant Owner, than an external System)
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d4f3c5a0bb074d09ae9b42b2b9bd7a08/1874de554ccd4ce4bb56c26e280bdaaf.html?locale=en-US
    This is more for mass creating / updating Objects or Users.
    (Not sure at all if you could trigger a Dataload)

However instead of writing (push) into the Datasphere, I would rather just read(pull) the Data and use the Standard way. (Create a Connection and Federate/Replicate the Data into Datasphere)
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/5d36f1aae68a4e59989c424a66d948c9.html

Hope this helps

entry.title: How to delete alert
entry.content:
Hi, using SAP version 10 FP2108.

According to SAP help document, alert can be deleted. I have include the help document here for reference:

Remove User AlertSelect one or multiple user alerts and choose this option to remove them.

You can configure user authorizations for alerts management in the Authorizations window.

If you’re upgrading from a lower version to SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2008, users with full authorization for alerts management are given full authorization to remove user alerts by default, while users with no authorization for alerts management are given no authorization to remove user alerts by default.

But when I tried to delete by call up the relevant alert, right click and choose 'Remove', the alert is just not remove. Any idea?

entry.title: BAPI to update BUT000-XDELE in copy program of VD05?
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I have cloned Transaction VD05 into custom and added an additional field but000-XDELE on screen 0510, Now on click on save i want BUT000 table to be updated with XDELE field whatever is passed on screen for respective customer.
Any BAPI that i can use for this requirement?
Regards, 
Poornima

entry.title: CDS view for material cost history
entry.content:
We need a CDS view that can provide material cost history. We are on SAP S/5 HANA Cloud 2402. The table MBEWH provides the required information but it cannot be used in a CDS view.

Any suggestions?

Jayshree

entry.title: Re: How to sort based on user input values
entry.content: Thanks for your approach

entry.title: Series period does not match current period 65171 SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

When I am trying to upload the Purchase Blanket Agreement data with DTW then I am facing error like

"Created Failed 241000009 Series period does not match current period 65171 "

SAP Business One 

Issue : Purchase Blanket Agreement DTW data

Kind regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: Certificate based authentication in MDK client
entry.content: Yes, the certificate must be installed on the device.  It will not fetch it from somewhere else it must already exist on the device.

entry.title: Re: Alert - 'Save History' option not working
entry.content:
Hi,

The following is the summary of the issue:
1. The issue happen to a specific alert only
2. The 'Save history' function is not tick, however, the alert appear as saved history.
3. I tested others alert there is no issue.
4. I have tested and checked on the alert query there is no issue also.
5. I renamed the existing alert and inactive it.
6. Created a new alert , this newly created alert with the same setup, same query, same condition have no issue.

entry.title: Re: Orderby Query in Offline Mode for Object Tables
entry.content: Please check your $metadata for the Asset_Manager_V2_Demo.service for the ItemNo field in the entity set.  I suspect the data type is String which when sorted will give the results you describe.  When you call your online service it is handling the sorting so it correctly comes out based on an integer sort.  You may need to change the data type of the ItemNo field in your service or possibly add another field of type Integer to get your desired results.

entry.title: Re: Side Drawer bind with Entity set
entry.content:
I am not sure I understand what you are looking to do?  Are you trying to display a menu row in the side drawer for each item in an entity set?

Side drawer is a menu / navigation tool and not designed to display lots of rows as from an entity set.  You may need to reconsider your app design in this case.

entry.title: F110 need for sible payment to multiple invoice but currently generate invoice wise payment
entry.content: F110 need for sible payment to multiple invoice but currently generate invoice wise payment

entry.title: Re: Certificate based authentication in MDK client
entry.content: Hey @bill_froelich, thanks for your reply, if you could share some reference on how to install a certificate and which type of certificate will this MDK Client require because in my android device there are multiple certificates already exists. I created a keystore to sign my build when building it with cloud build feature from mobile service cockpit. Also have created some ".cert" and ".pem" with openssl cmd. Please help me with some more knowledge on this really appreciate your help here.

entry.title: Re: Certificate based authentication in MDK client
entry.content: What type of certificate will depend on your identity provider supports and wants.

entry.title: Re: How can we create a FORM using SAP Adobe Forms BTP from a S4 HANA onPrem system
entry.content:
Hi @prvn774: Yes actually I dint understand the architecture properly.The solution is we need not use Form API or even the Cloud level Template store.

Kindly refer this link https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-neo/architecture.Even though it is for Neo they have given better expalination

as per the above lines we can understand that The ADS service alone we are going to use from cloud whereas the Template Repository and ABAP code all gonna be the same as classical way . So  only the config to the ADS changes and nothing else going to change.

entry.title: Re: converting XML fields into single json string
entry.content:
Hi Nagaraju,

The below XSLT will suits for requirement,

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">

    <xsl:output method="text" encoding="UTF-8"/>

       <xsl:template match="/">

        <xsl:text>{</xsl:text>

        <xsl:text>"client_id": "</xsl:text>

        <xsl:value-of select="/request/client_id"/>

        <xsl:text>", </xsl:text>

        <xsl:text>"client_secret": "</xsl:text>

        <xsl:value-of select="/request/client_secret"/>

        <xsl:text>", </xsl:text>

        <xsl:text>"grant_type": "</xsl:text>

        <xsl:value-of select="/request/grant_type"/>

        <xsl:text>"}</xsl:text>

    </xsl:template>

</xsl:stylesheet>

Thanks,

Ismail

entry.title: Re: How to delete alert
entry.content:
Hi beehoiphoebe_yeo

Please check SAP note 3156621 for the issue faced.

Hope it helps.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Is it possible to print smartform directly to printer in background Job ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement where i need to print smartform directly to printer in background job.

entry.title: Getting timeout error when using for loop.
entry.content:
Dear All,
I am using for loop to improve the performance of the report but still getting error like timeout error(dump).
So, How to solve?
Thanks in Advance.
My implemented code: 

it_final = value #( for lsmatdoc in it_matdoc
                     let zval = reduce labst( init lv_x type labst for lsmatdoc2 in it_matdoc2
                          WHERE ( matbf = lsmatdoc-matbf and charg_sid = lsmatdoc-charg_sid )
                         next lv_x = lv_x + lsmatdoc2-dmbtr_stock )
                         zqun = reduce labst( init lv_Y type labst for lsmat2 in it_matdoc2
                            WHERE ( matbf = lsmatdoc-matbf and charg_sid = lsmatdoc-charg_sid )
                         next lv_y = lv_y + lsmat2-stock_qty )
                         zday = lcl_cal=>cal_days( exporting dt1 = value #( it_mcha[ matnr = lsmatdoc-matbf charg = lsmatdoc-charg_sid werks = lsmatdoc-werks ]-ersda
                                                                                    default lsmatdoc-bldat  ) )
                     in
                   (
                    matnr = lsmatdoc-matbf
                    stloc = lsmatdoc-lgort_sid
                    plant = lsmatdoc-werks
                    batch = lsmatdoc-charg_sid
                    maktx = value #( it_makt[ matnr = lsmatdoc-matbf ]-maktx default space )
                    zvalu = zval
                    zquan = zqun
                    ztotv = cond labst( when RB1 EQ 'X' THEN ZQUN
                                        WHEN RB2 EQ 'X' THEN zval )
                    grndt = value #( it_mcha[ matnr = lsmatdoc-matbf charg = lsmatdoc-charg_sid werks = lsmatdoc-werks ]-ersda default lsmatdoc-bldat  )
                    zdayy = zday
                    zthit = cond i( when zday le 30 and RB1 eq 'X' then zqun
                                    when zday le 30 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zsixt = cond i( when zday le 60 and zday ge 31 AND RB1 EQ 'X' then zqun
                                    when zday le 60 and zday ge 31 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    znint = cond i( when zday le 90 and zday ge 61 AND RB1 EQ 'X' then zqun
                                    when zday le 90 and zday ge 61 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zotwt = cond i( when zday le 120 and zday ge 91 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 120 and zday ge 91 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zofif = cond i( when zday le 150 and zday ge 121 AND RB1 EQ 'X' then zqun
                                    when zday le 150 and zday ge 121 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zoeit = cond i( when zday le 180 and zday ge 151 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 180 and zday ge 151 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztwtn = cond i( when zday le 210 and zday ge 181 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 210 and zday ge 181 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztfor = cond i( when zday le 240 and zday ge 211 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 240 and zday ge 211 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztsev = cond i( when zday le 270 and zday ge 241 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 270 and zday ge 241 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztthr = cond i( when zday le 300 and zday ge 271 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 300 and zday ge 271 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zttht = cond i( when zday le 330 and zday ge 301 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 330 and zday ge 301 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztsix = cond i( when zday le 360 and zday ge 331 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 360 and zday ge 331 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zmsix = cond string( when zday ge 365 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                         when zday ge 365 and RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                         else ' ' )

                    remarks = cond string( when zday le 180 then 'Moving'
                                           when zday le 366 and zday gt 180 then 'Slow moving item'
                                           else 'Non Moving Item' )   ) ).

entry.title: Multiple service PO for a single PR
entry.content:
Hi SAP members,

I have a scenario where a user generates a service PR.
While generating a PO with reference to the PR the PO is generated
When another user generates a PO with reference to the same PR a duplicate PO is generated.. this should not happen... where should the configuration be done... solutions welcome

Thanks in advance...!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
Hi, 
someone already raised a request within the influence portal regarding this: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/323462/

Anyway: From my point of view this is not a real feature, more a missing function which differs from all other current available access policies. So would be great to change this by SAP without waiting for huge number of customer votes and before 2025. 😉

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP-based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on-premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment.

Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday 28th June 2024 in Bengaluru, India from 9:00 - 16:00 IST. 

Location: Mindset Experience India Pvt. Ltd, WeWork Galaxy, 43 Residency Road, Shanthala Nagar, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru - 560025

The event is kindly being hosted by Mindset Consulting, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 35 attendees. If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page.

The instructors are Developer Advocates Sheena M K , Shilpa Shankar and Ajay Soreng. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: converting XML fields into single json string
entry.content:
Dear Ismail,

thanks for you immediate response. sorry its my bad i have not given clarity in my question about my requirment, i have checked in the operation mapping but i am not getting the proper output what i have expected.

let me explain my requirement first. i have to send the data ( 3 fields ) to the rest api in the body level especially  x-www-form-urlencoded. i have read some of few blogs in sap but they have achieved this requirement through java mapping but i don't want to go this approach because i don't have any knowledge on java. so i choose xslt mapping approach. even i have tried the xslt code in the chatgpt also but not getting as excepted, chatgpt code level getting single sting as a out put but not getting values. i would request you could you please make the changes in the chatgpt code if possible.

your xslt code response in Operation mapping:

 

My requirement in the postman collection :

 

my request payload in the operation mapping :

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ xmlns:ns0="urn://x-www-form-urlencoded/checking/atreceiver/rest">
<client_id>sfv24</client_id>
<client_secret>45g34</client_secret>
<grant_type>doif4</grant_type>
</ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ>

expecting output : 

client_id=iweu245&client_secret=oirt3453&grant_type=u4wonok64

 

output level field & vlaues seperated by "=" ( equals to ) and seperator : "&"

 

chatgpt xslt code :

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"
xmlns:ns0="urn://x-www-form-urlencoded/checking/atreceiver/rest">

<xsl:output method="text"/>

<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:text>client_id=</xsl:text>
<xsl:value-of select="//ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ/ns0:client_id"/>
<xsl:text>&client_secret=</xsl:text>
<xsl:value-of select="//ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ/ns0:client_secret"/>
<xsl:text>&grant_type=</xsl:text>
<xsl:value-of select="//ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ/ns0:grant_type"/>
</xsl:template>

</xsl:stylesheet>

 

chatgpt xslt code output in operation mapping:

 

Thanks in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Nagaraju

entry.title: Re: Interface technologies supported by SAP BTP, ABAP env...
entry.content:
Hi Felix,

supported protocols and authentication methods for inbound/outbound communication can be found here:
Supported Protocols and Authentication Methods

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Not able to cascade a picklist ( State & City )
entry.content:
The error you're encountering seems to be related to the configuration of cascading picklists in your system. This type of error typically occurs when there is a mismatch or misconfiguration in the way the picklists are set up and referenced. Here’s a step-by-step guide to help you troubleshoot and resolve the issue:

Step-by-Step Troubleshooting

  1. Verify Picklist Creation:

    • Ensure that both the 'State' (parent) and 'City' (child) picklists have been created correctly with all the necessary values.

  2. Assign Picklists to MDF Object:

    • Confirm that the picklists are correctly assigned to the MDF object 'Business Unit'.
    • Check that the fields cust_state and cust_city are correctly configured to use the State and City picklists respectively.

  3. Check Field Criteria:

    • The error indicates an issue with the field criteria configuration for cascading the picklists. Review the criteria to ensure they are correctly set up.

  4. Review the Cascading Configuration:

    • Ensure that the cascading configuration is set up properly in the system. This typically involves specifying the source field (parent picklist) and the destination field (child picklist).

      Detailed Steps:

      Step 1: Verify Picklist Values

      • Go to the picklist management section and verify that the values for both 'State' and 'City' are correctly defined.

      Step 2: Assign Picklists to MDF Object

      • Navigate to the MDF object definition for 'Business Unit'.
      • Ensure that the cust_state field is configured to use the 'State' picklist and the cust_city field is configured to use the 'City' picklist.

      Step 3: Check Field Criteria

      • Review the field criteria setup for cascading picklists:
        • Ensure that the sourceFieldName is correctly specified as the field that contains the parent picklist values (in this case, it should be cust_state).
        • Ensure that the destinationFieldValue is correctly specified to match the child picklist field (in this case, cust_city).

    • Step 4: Configure Cascading Picklists

      • Go to the cascading picklist configuration section.
      • Add a new cascading rule if it’s not already created.
        • Set Source Field to the parent picklist field (cust_state).
        • Set Destination Field to the child picklist field (cust_city).
        • Map the parent picklist values to the corresponding child picklist values.

      • Example Configuration:

        Parent Picklist (State)

        Value Label
        CACalifornia
        TXTexas

        Child Picklist (City)

        Value Label Parent Value (State)
        LALos AngelesCA
        SFSan FranciscoCA
        ATXAustinTX
        DALDallasTX
    • Field Criteria Example:
      sourceFieldName: 'cust_state'
      destinationFieldValue: 'cust_city'
      defaultDestinationValue: ''

    • Common Pitfalls:

      • Incorrect Field Names: Double-check that the field names used in the cascading configuration match the actual field names in the MDF object.
      • Case Sensitivity: Ensure that the field names are case-sensitive and match exactly.
      • Picklist Value Mapping: Ensure that every parent picklist value has a corresponding child picklist value mapped correctly.

      By following these steps, you should be able to resolve the cascading picklist error. If the issue persists, please provide more details about your configuration, and I'll be happy to assist further.

entry.title: Re: Export for transport type CBC locked. No target syste...
entry.content: Hello Lucian thank you for your answer. I am not trying to export a customizing request form a development tenant. I am in the customizing tenant of the development system, and when we wanted to activate RITA, looks like the system was telling us that the customizing objects are locked in a CBC Transport Request. So we thought we could release that CBC Transport request (and if there is an order to respect, to release the other CBC Transports before this one), and then carry on with our customizing, in our own customizing transport request. Now we feel like we are stick with this RITA Activation because of this lock issue. Regards

entry.title: Re: GenAI Agentic Workflows with the Supply Chain Advisor
entry.content:
very well written @vedant_gupta. It is nice to see an example where LLM agent is used to solve a business challenge especially in supply chain area. 

LLM agents combined with RAG can be a powerful approach to solve real business problems.

entry.title: Re: Authenticating an API using SAML assertion in SAP API...
entry.content:
Hi @giridhar_vegi,

when generating the SAML assertion yourself in APIM you are essentially declaring it your identity provider. That is a severe security risk. Any error or exploitable gap would to lead to user compromise. Identity Providers are purpose-built for this. I am assuming you are bypassing another challenge by looking to implement this yourself. Feel free to share more, so the community can advise on solving the underlying challenge.

If you must explore further have a look at this javascript library and this ApiGee article how to generate your own in SAP APIM. Make sure to lock down access tightly. Either way, I highly discourage this.

KR Martin

entry.title: Re: 10 Steps to Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition for Customers
entry.content: Is it possible for Partner organizations to register members as well?

entry.title: Re: CD/CD with SAP Native HANA Application dev space
entry.content: Hi, I'm referring to the project type as indicated in the image(SAP HANA Database Project).

entry.title: Re: How to start a java application in BTP from Job Sched...
entry.content:
A cf task is pretty much any CLI command you want to send to the container of the app. But you will be constrained to the installed CLI commands in the container of what is possible.

For a NodeJs application I could run "npm start" to start my application or "node -v" to get version info, Java has similar commands. These commands would be the value for your 'action'.

To test which cli commands are understood in your container (before configuring the task) you could run the below in your terminal and check in the logs of the deployed app what the output/error is:

cf run-task MYAPP --command "echo 12345"

"Please assign a value to the following mandatory fields: Amount posted."

Accrual:

Recruit Rule:

 

If you may be able to point me in the right direction it would be a big help.

Kind regards,

entry.title: EWM HU number range unique at mandant level
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing EWM in two factories (before more). Those factories will transfer produced goods in HU to a DC center (wich aims to be on EWM) & between themselves (for semi-finish goods).

Goods will be packed within same packaging material and can be transferred within all EWM warehouses. Based on this, we need to use the same HU numbering for those HU in all factories.

Problem is, standard EWM HU numbering (number range /SCWM/HUID) is based on warehouse number :

 

Thus, if we have same Packaging material in all warehouses, we cannot use same number range such as HU_VEKP.

The only solution we have found is the use of BADI / SCWM/EX_CORE_HU_EXT_HUID where we can manipulate HU number at it’s creation to use number range HU_VEKP to have a unique HU number at mandant level. Prerequisite is external HU number range is the same as HU_VEKP.

However, we would like to avoir making a specific for this. Consequently, we are wondering if a standard solution exist to ensure a unique HU number at mandant level for an EWM HU creation.

We are looking forward to your answers.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ 和 VCP 集成时，为何变式定价码的有效条件记录未展现在 Responder 中？

entry.title: Re: Export for transport type CBC locked. No target syste...
entry.content:
Hi @sdig89 ,

I don't see any direct connection to the Central Business Configuration system or RITA 

The error message you provided ATO_CMN_EXPORT 036 would suggest the system is a standalone system landscape.

Please open an incident to the dedicated transport app support  Export Customizing Transports   BC-CUS-TOL-CTO to check the exact situation in your system and reason for the error message shown.

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Re: Getting timeout error when using for loop.
entry.content: You are wrong, "for loop" never improved performance, it improves the legibility of code ("functional" writing). Performance is improved only if you use TYPE SORTED or HASHED internal tables.

entry.title: Re: SAP BODS - Data exporting in incorrect order (.csv file)
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you included an order by Key Column in a query advancing your output?

BR

Julian

entry.title: ABAP
entry.content:
Hello, I need help with the following question:

Which of the following actions cause an indirect change to a database table requiring a table conversion?
Note: There are 2 correct answers to this question.

a. Changing the field labels of a data element that is used in the table definition.

b. Shortening the length of a domain used in a data element that is used in the table definition.

c. Renaming a field in a structure that is included in the table definition

d. Deleting a field from a structure that is included in the table definition.

entry.title: Re: Getting timeout error when using for loop.
entry.content: Thank you for your response, I will try.

entry.title: Re: How to implement Onboarding 2.0 without Employee Central?
entry.content: Can we also use EC position management system with EC mini master to create Job requisition in Recruiting?

entry.title: valuated stock in transit for scope item BDN
entry.content: Currently sell from valuated stock (scope item 5MQ) is available for sell from stock. I asked to activate valuated stock in transit for bought in items (Scope item BDN).  The expert configuration should add sales doc type OR and item category CBAB. I got back this is not possible from SAP. The only difference with regular sell from stock is that an item is bought in for a certain sales order. As soon as the sales order is delivered DAP to a customer with a certain distance we want to keep it valuated stock in transit.  Why is this not possible?

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ 和 VCP 集成时，为何变式定价码的有效条件记录未展现在 Responder 中？
entry.content:
@kelvinye 

  1. 这关于到了 VC 以及 AVC 对吗?
    主要涉及 Variant Pricing 的集成场景。
  2. 那么如果要“逼” Responder 中展示的变式定价码定价条件记录 - 这是不是可以在 SAP VCP 做 custom extension 呢还是需要后台 ERP 呢？
    在不变更 ERP 中 Pricing Procedure 配置的前提下，可以通过 VCP extension 修改返回给 CPQ 的 Response Payload 中的 InactiveFlag、Statistical两个字段值，从而满足 CPQ 展示变式定价码条件记录的前提。但不推荐这样实施，因为这两个字段具备业务含义，与 ERP 不一致的增强逻辑可能会导致其它结果的不一致。

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP CAP with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: You can find step by step instructions in SAP TechEd 2023 Exercise - XP261 What you get with this is only health check metrics for a node.js (or Java) application. CAP's open telemetry support does not support pushing data to Cloud ALM. So you don't get the additional measurements by CAP in Cloud ALM.

entry.title: Re: Date shown wrong in SAP Analytics Cloud based on SAP...
entry.content:
Hi rrajmahesh09.

Might be that your solution works as well (have not tested it), but my solution comes with the advantage that you keep the time hierarchy Year-Month-Day on the Date field, if you associated this. 

And you have only the one Date field in your model, you need.

One major disadvantage remains... in an input variable for the date, you still have to enter the internal format: YYYY-MM-DD

BR, Martin

entry.title: Create Button not working in Manage Sales order Version 2 F3893 application
entry.content:
we have SAP S/4 HANA 2023 version, and in the new Manange Sales order V2 app, the create button link is not working.

Nothing happens when we click on it, nothing in the error log, no console or network error.

It is not calling any odata service.

Can anyone help us here ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: open production order report query
entry.content:
Here is Error Free Query 


SELECT
T0."DocEntry",
T0."DocNum",
T0."PostDate",
T0."DueDate",
(CASE
WHEN T0."Status" = 'L' THEN 'Closed'
WHEN T0."Status" = 'R' THEN 'Released'
WHEN T0."Status" = 'C' THEN 'Cancelled'
END) AS "Status",
T0."ItemCode",
T2."ItemName",
T0."PlannedQty",
T0."CmpltQty",
T0."RjctQty",
T1."ItemCode",
T3."ItemName",
T1."PlannedQty",
T1."IssuedQty",
T1."VisOrder" AS "Row"
FROM OWOR T0
LEFT OUTER JOIN WOR1 T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry"
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T2 ON T0."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode"
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T3 ON T3."ItemCode" = T1."ItemCode"
WHERE T0."PostDate" >= '[%0]'
AND T0."PostDate" <= '[%1]'
AND T1."VisOrder" = 0

UNION ALL

SELECT
T0."DocEntry",
NULL AS "DocNum",
NULL AS "PostDate",
NULL AS "DueDate",
NULL AS "Status",
NULL AS "ItemCode",
NULL AS "ItemName",
NULL AS "PlannedQty",
NULL AS "CmpltQty",
NULL AS "RjctQty",
T1."ItemCode",
T3."ItemName",
T1."PlannedQty",
T1."IssuedQty",
T1."VisOrder" AS "Row"
FROM OWOR T0
LEFT OUTER JOIN WOR1 T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry"
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T2 ON T0."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode"
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T3 ON T3."ItemCode" = T1."ItemCode"
WHERE T0."PostDate" >= '[%0]'
AND T0."PostDate" <= '[%1]'
AND T1."VisOrder" > 0
ORDER BY 1, 14; -- DocEntry is the 1st column and VisOrder is the 14th column

entry.title: Re: Getting timeout error when using for loop.

We have raised a ticket, and got below reply "Since SSO is enabled on Signavio,  we must use an API Technical user credentials, who can log in to SIgnavio without SSO."

However, we were able to integrate before without this API user credentials. Not sure if something changed at SIgnavio side.
 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation from SAP Build Apps without using API
ABAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone, Could you please help me in choosing the right answer for the following question:

When does SAP recommended to use a sorted or a hashes table respectively? Notes: There are 2 correct answers to this question.

a. A hashed table, when you read a single record and specify the complete key.

b. A sorted table, when you read a single record and specify non key fields.

c. A hashed table, when you read a subset in a loop and specify a part of the key from the left without gaps.

d. A sorted table, when you read a subset in a loop and specify a part of the key from left without gaps.

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas on Public Cloud: Search help prob...
entry.content:

the problem has been solved with note 3394309. S/4HANA Cloud 2408 will also contain the fix.
As a workaround an explicit click in the inputfield before opening the valuehelp is available.

Best Regards!

However, in many of these bubbles, the 'Next' button does not appear, causing the user to get stuck in the tour. I am certain that I selected the setting to show the 'Next' button.

Am I doing something wrong?

Many thanks!

J

entry.title: Re: I need to buy SAP Analytics cloud trial base
entry.content:
Hello @vaishanavibashyam ,

One way to go from my knowledge, assuming you're not looking for a productive use. Register to SAC license With a new user/email(the one never used for the trial) and register for the subscription with a test license: 1 user 50 EU per/month - this is the cheapest:

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/serviceCatalog/sap-analytics-cloud?region=all&tab=service_plan&commercialModel=subscription

Check out in the discovery center above.

***Note: The above is strictly recommended for a non-productive use only***

Cheers, Mahesh

entry.title: Re: About setting up bank fees
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b8c08e0197454541a11f8d46ef1ab96e/748b21ec30c044789a51f151e29b6bd0.html

entry.title: Re: ABAP
entry.content:
Two things in all the exam questions you have asked since yesterday or Monday:

  1. It's very bad practice to ask a question without searching first yourself (obviously, you didn't because you don't explain what you partially understood, where you have a doubt, etc., like a student would do by asking the teacher)
  2. It's also bad practice to not use an adequate question title. Here the adequate title would be obviously "When does SAP recommended to use a sorted or a hashes table respectively".

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Visual Inspection Process in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @mth42,

Thank you for your question!

Here's a solution you can try:

1. Open the Manage Machine Learning Models app and edit your model.
2. Under Model Inputs, add a Resize transformation, and specify both the Width and Height as 224. This ensures that any image captured in the Perform Visual Inspections app gets resized to 224*224.


3. Try the model out in the Perform Visual Inspections app.

If everything runs smoothly and you don't see any error messages, it could mean that your model training pipeline has a “resize-to-224” step somewhere. This means your model gets trained on 224*224 images even if it's fed images of different resolutions. As a result, when you input any image to the trained model that’s not 224*224, the model doesn't accept it.

If you encounter further problems, please don't hesitate to reach out!
